name: chaingammon
description: Monorepo for the Chaingammon project, including server, contracts, and frontend components.

scripts.contracts:deploy: pnpm --filter contracts exec hardhat run script/deploy.js --network 0g-testnet
scripts.contracts:verify: pnpm --filter contracts exec hardhat run script/verify.js --network 0g-testnet
scripts.server:test: cd server && uv run pytest tests/
scripts.test: pnpm server:test && pnpm --filter contracts test && pnpm --filter frontend test
